posts.author: rosalind (Rosalind Guy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Has anyone been able to create a Stakeholder Power Grid chart in Monday?

The template Monday has for a stakeholder board, uses statuses of high to low for Impact Level and Level of Involvement. In MS Excel I am using numbers and a bubble chart with error bars to divide the quadrant which is all good. In Monday the bubble chart does not react in the same way.

Any ideas?
